title: Lift Engineer
description:
We are seeking a qualified and experienced Lift Engineer to oversee the operation, maintenance, and performance of lift and escalator systems across a portfolio of residential and/or commercial properties. The successful candidate will ensure all vertical transportation systems are safe, compliant with regulatory standards, and maintained to a high level of reliability and service quality.

Key Responsibilities

  • Manage and supervise lift maintenance contractors to ensure service quality, safety compliance, and contractual obligations are met.
  • Conduct regular inspections, audits, and performance assessments of lift and escalator systems.
  • Review maintenance reports, breakdown records, and ensure timely rectification of defects and faults.
  • Coordinate major repairs, modernisation, replacement works, and upgrading projects.
  • Ensure all systems comply with relevant statutory regulations, safety codes, and authority requirements.
  • Investigate lift incidents, user complaints, and safety issues, and implement corrective actions.
  • Prepare technical reports, proposals, specifications, and cost estimates for lift-related works.
  • Liaise with internal stakeholders, contractors, consultants, and regulatory bodies.
  • Monitor budgets and control costs related to lift maintenance and projects.
  • Support tendering processes including evaluation of technical submissions and contractor performance.

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Mechanical, Electrical Engineering or a related discipline.
  • Minimum 3–5 years of relevant experience in lift and escalator maintenance, engineering, or facilities management.
  • Strong knowledge of lift systems, safety standards, and regulatory requirements.
  • Experience in managing lift maintenance contracts and vendors.
  • Good problem-solving, analytical, and project management skills.
  • Able to work independently and handle multiple sites or projects.
  • Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.
  • Proficient in MS Office and report writing.

Preferred Attributes

  • Registered Lift Engineer or relevant professional certifications (where applicable).
  • Experience working in large residential estates, public infrastructure, or facilities management environments.
  • Familiarity with modernisation and asset lifecycle management projects.

Reg No. R1980724

Triton AI Pte Ltd

License no. 21C0661

postedCompany.description:
TRITON AI (EA License Number 21C0661) is a Singaporean-owned talent resource organization formed with the purpose of developing a Singaporean core for our clients.


Established since 2011 and formally operating as Talent Touche Pte Ltd, TRITON AI has undergone a total rebranding exercise in 2021 in alignment with our mission to enhance the effectiveness of Talent Acquisition and People-Powered Projects with Technology and Artificial Intelligence.
